title: myrtus neocaledonica
intro: Myrtus neocaledonica, also known as the New Caledonian myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family (Myrtaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its essential oil rich in geraniol, borneol, and myrtenol. The medicinal properties of M. neocaledonica have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting against infections, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of M. neocaledonica can be found in the form of essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
